---
name: Engineering Task
about: Track a technical improvement, refactor, design-system task, or frontend/backend engineering work item
title: "Engineering: "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Problem
<!-- Describe the engineering problem clearly. -->

## Why this matters
<!-- Explain the impact on maintainability, correctness, product quality, or delivery speed. -->

## Evidence
<!--
List concrete evidence.

Examples:
- oversized files
- duplicated logic
- brittle tests
- inconsistent UI patterns
- weak validation
-->

## Scope
<!-- Describe what is in scope for this task. -->

## Non-goals
<!--
Describe what should stay out of scope.

Examples:
- no rewrite
- no unrelated visual redesign
- no backend contract changes
-->

## References
<!--
Add useful links and file references.

Examples:
- related issue
- repo-relative file path
- external reference or design system
-->

## Desired outcome
<!-- Describe the target state after the work lands. -->

## Technical notes
<!--
Add implementation direction if known.

Examples:
- proposed component split
- suggested state boundaries
- token or design-system direction
- validation strategy
-->

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- List observable conditions that must be true when this task is done. -->

## Dependencies
<!-- Optional. List related issues or sequencing notes. -->
